description: Binary Home-Run label: 1 if Maximum Favorable Excursion over the SEPA holding period exceeds 30%, 0 otherwise. Boundary chosen to match the asymmetric R-thesis of the strategy: we only deploy capital on setups likely to run >30%. Positive base rate ~14.5% (rare class, class weighting required). MFE = MAX(high) / FIRST(close) - 1 aggregated across the trade session, from entry_date to the SEPA exit (C1 OR C2 OR C6 lost). Trades still open at the end of the data window are capped at entry_date + 120 days. Sourced from v_d2_training.mfe_pct. Bucketing logic lives in scripts/train_mfe_classifier.py::create_mfe_labels — boundaries read from this file's `bins` field.
exit_rule: C1 OR C2 OR C6 lost (close < SMA150 OR close < SMA200 OR close < SMA50). Trade defined by SepaWatchlistManager session boundaries; mfe_pct is the max close-to-close return reached within the open session. Open-at-end-of-data fallback: entry_date + 120 days.
source_query: SELECT ticker, date, mfe_pct FROM v_d2_training WHERE feature_version = 'v3.1' AND mfe_pct IS NOT NULL
